component.name: Droppix Client
component.summary: Use this PC as a second monitor for a droppix host

description.p: The droppix client turns a Linux PC into an extended display for a droppix host: it connects over USB or WiFi, decodes the H.264 stream to a window, plays the host's audio, and sends touch/mouse input back — the desktop counterpart to the droppix Android app.
Fully self-contained: it only needs a droppix host to connect to. No KDE, evdi, or root required on this machine.
